channel.title: Legal/Compliance on Lucky Taorem | Tech & AI Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Legal/Compliance on Lucky Taorem | Tech & AI Blog

item.title: Why Apple Excluded Jony Ive from Its OpenAI Lawsuit
item.description: Apple left Jony Ive out of its $6.5 billion OpenAI trade‑secret suit, hinting at Laurene Powell Jobs' influence and the company's hardware push.

item.title: EU Slaps AliExpress with Record $629M DSA Fine
item.description: The European Commission fines AliExpress €550 million for non‑compliance with the Digital Services Act, highlighting platform safety and EU enforcement.

item.title: EU Slaps AliExpress with Record $625M DSA Fine
item.description: EU Commission fines AliExpress $625 million under the DSA for not removing counterfeit and unsafe goods, forcing a new era of e‑commerce compliance.

item.title: ACLU Toolkit Exposes Hidden Police Surveillance Tech Use
item.description: The ACLU of Massachusetts launched a free toolkit for defense attorneys to uncover secret police surveillance tech like Flock, Shot Spotter, and AI reports.

item.title: Punjab Haryana High Court
item.description: Punjab Haryana High Court recent judgments and orders

item.title: Supreme Court Imposes Fine
item.description: Supreme Court dismisses Chhattisgarh's plea, imposes cost for challenging landowners' compensation

item.title: Amazon Faces Political Retaliation Lawsuit
item.description: Amazon engineers sue for illegal retaliation after voicing political views. Deep dive into legal, tech, and corporate culture impacts.
